mantra:asthi-visarjan:diwali-visarjan-ma.title: Diwali Visarjan Mantra
mantra:asthi-visarjan:diwali-visarjan-ma.text:
यान्तु देवगणाः सर्वे पूजामादाय मामकीम्।
इष्ट-काम-समृद्घ्यर्थं पुनरागमनाय च॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-invoc.title: Kamala Yantra — Invocation of main deity

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-peeth.title: Kamala Yantra — Peetha Puja opening Mantra
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-peeth.text: Om Mandukadi Paratatvanta Peetha Devatabhyo Namah।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-peeth.title: Kamala Yantra — Peetha Puja (nine Peetha Shakti)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-peeth.text:
1. Om Vibhutyai Namah।
2. Om Unmanyai Namah।
3. Om Kantyai Namah।
4. Om Srishtyai Namah।
5. Om Kirtyai Namah।
6. Om Sannatyai Namah।
7. Om Pushtyai Namah।
8. Om Utkrishtyai Namah।
9. Madhye - Om Riddhyai Namah।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-prath.title: Kamala Yantra — Pratham Avarana (Shatkona Kesareshu)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-prath.text:
1. Agnikone - Om Shram Hridayaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Nairritye - Om Shreem Shirase Swaha। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Vayavye - Om Shrum Shikhayai Vashat। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Eshanye - Om Shraim Kavachaya Hun। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Agre - Om Shraum Netratrayaya Vaushat। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Pashchime - Om Shrah Astraya Phat - Devi। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-prath.title: Kamala Yantra — Pratham Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-prath.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Prathamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-dwiti.title: Kamala Yantra — Dwitiya Avaranam (Ashtadale Kesareshu)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-dwiti.text:
1. Purve - Om Vasudevaya Namah। Vasudeva Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Dakshine - Om Sankarshanaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Pashchime - Om Pradyumnaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Uttare - Om Aniruddhaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Agneye - Om Damakaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Nairrityai - Om Salilaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Vayavyai - Om Guggulaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Eshanye - Om Karuntakaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
9. Devya Dakshine - Om Shankhanidhaye Namah। Om Vasudhayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
10. Devya Vame - Om Padmanidhaye Namah। Om Vasumatyai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-dwiti.title: Kamala Yantra — Dwitiya Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-dwiti.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Dwitiyavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-triti.title: Kamala Yantra — Tritiya Avaranam (Ashtadalagre)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-triti.text:
1. Om Balakyai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Om Vimalayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Om Kamalayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Om Vanamalikayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Om Vibhishikayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Om Malikayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Om Shankaryyai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Om Vasumalikayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-triti.title: Kamala Yantra — Tritiya Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-triti.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Tritiyavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-chatu.title: Kamala Yantra — Chaturtha Avaranam (Bhupure, 10 directions)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-chatu.text:
1. Purve - Om Lam Indraya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Agneye - Om Ram Agnaye Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Dakshine - Om Mam Yaamay Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Nairrityai - Om Ksham Nirritaye Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Pashchime - Om Vam Varunaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Vayavye - Om Yam Vayave Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Uttare - Om Kum Kuberaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Eshanye - Om Ham Ishanaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
9. Ishanapurvayormadhye - Om Aam Brahmane Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
10. Nirriti Pashchimayormadhye - Om Hrim Anantaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-chatu.title: Kamala Yantra — Chaturtha Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-chatu.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Chaturthavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-panch.title: Kamala Yantra — Pancham Avaranam (Dikpala, 10 directions)
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-panch.text:
1. Om Vajraya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Om Shaktyai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Om Dandaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Om Khadgaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Om Pashaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Om Ankushaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Om Gadayai Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Om Trishulaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
9. Om Padmaya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
10. Om Chakraya Namah। Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-panch.title: Kamala Yantra — Pancham Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:kamala-yantra-panch.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Panchamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Peetha Puja opening Mantra
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text: Om Mandukadi Paratatvanta Peetha Devatabhyo Namah।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Peetha Puja (nine Peetha Shakti)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text:
1. Om Vibhutyai Namah।
2. Om Unmanyai Namah।
3. Om Kantyai Namah।
4. Om Srishtyai Namah।
5. Om Kirtyai Namah।
6. Om Sannatyai Namah।
7. Om Pushtyai Namah।
8. Om Utkrishtyai Namah।
9. Madhye - Om Riddhyai Namah।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Pratham Avarana (Shatkone)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text:
1. Om Hiranyayai Hridayaya Namah। Hridaya Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥
2. Om Chandraya Shirase Swaha। Shirah Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥
3. Om Rajatasrajayai Shikhayai vashat। Shikha Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥
4. Om Hiranyasrajayai Kavachaya Hum। Kavacha Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥
5. Om Hiranyayai Netratrayaya Vaushat। Netra Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥
6. Om Hiranyavarnayai Astraya Phat। Astra Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Pratham Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Prathamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-d.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Dwitiya Avaranam (Ashtadale) 1
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-d.text:
Hiranyavarnam Harinim Suvarnarajasrajam।
Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-d.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Dwitiya Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-d.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Dwitiyavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-t.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Tritiya Avaranam (Dwadashadale) 1
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-t.text:
Chandram Prabhasam Yashasa Jvalantim Shriyam Loke Devajushtamudaram।
Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami Namah॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-t.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Tritiya Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-t.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Tritiyavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-c.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Chaturtha Avaranam (Shodashadale) 1
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-c.text:
Shrim Hrim Shrim Kamale Namah।
Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-c.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Chaturtha Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-c.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Chaturthavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Pancham Avaranam (first Vithika)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text:
Yah Shuchih Prayato Bhutva Juhuyadajyamanvaham।
Shriyah Panchadasharcham Cha Shrikamah Satatam Japet।
Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Pancham Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-p.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Panchamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Shashtham Avaranam (Matrika, second Vithika)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.text:
Am Aam Im Eem Um Uum Rim Rim Lrim Lrim Em Aim Om Aum Am Ah Kam Kham
Gam Gham Nam Cham Chham Jam Jham Yam Tam Tham Dam Dham Nam Tam Tham
Dam Dham Nam Pam Pham Bam Bham Mam Yam Ram Lam Vam Sham Sham Sam
Ham Lam Ksham Matrika Rupayai Shri Mahalakshmyai Namah।
Shrimahalakshmi Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Shashtham Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Shashthamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Saptam Avaranam (Shodashadala middle & Bhupur)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.text:
1. Om Padmayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Om Padmavarnayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Om Padmasthayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Om Ardrayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Om Tarpayantyai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Om Triptayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Om Jvalantyai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Om Swarnaprakarayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Saptam Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-s.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Saptamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-a.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Ashtam Avaranam (Bhupure, 10 directions)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-a.text:
1. Purve - Indraya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Agneyam - Agneye Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Dakshine - Yamaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Nairrityam - Nairritye Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Pashchime - Varunaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Vayavyam - Vayave Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Uttare - Kuberaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Eshanyam - Ishanaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
9. Ishanapurvayormadhye - Brahmane Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
10. Nairrityapashchimayormadhye - Anantaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-a.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Ashtam Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-a.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Ashtamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-n.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Navam Avaranam (Lokapala, 10 directions)
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-n.text:
1. Om Vajraya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
2. Om Shaktyai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
3. Om Dandaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
4. Om Khadgaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
5. Om Pashaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
6. Om Ankushaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
7. Om Gadayai Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
8. Om Trishulaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
9. Om Padmaya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥
10. Om Chakraya Namah। Shrimahalakshmi Shri Padukam Pujayami Tarpayami॥

mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-n.title: Shri Sukta Yantra — Navam Pushpanjali
mantra:das-mahavidya:shri-sukta-yantra-n.text:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala।
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Navamavaranarchanam॥
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu।

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-achamana-ma.title: Dhanvantari Achamana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-achamana-ma.text:
Om Atma-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।
Om Vidya-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।
Om Shiva-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-sankalpa-ma.title: Dhanvantari Sankalpa Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-sankalpa-ma.text:
Om Tatsat Adyaitasya Brahmanoahni Dwitiya-Prahararddhe Shveta-Varaha-Kalpe
Jambu-Dvipe Bharata-Khande Amuka-Pradeshe Amuka-Punya-Kshetre Kaliyuge
Kali-Prathama-Charane Amuka-Samvatsare Kartika-Mase Krishna-Pakshe
Trayodashi-Tithau Amuka-Vasare Amuka-Gotrotpanno Amuka-Nama-Aham
Shri Dhanvantari-Devata-Priti-Purvakam Ayushya-Arogya-Eshvarya-Abhivriddhyartham
Shri Dhanvantari-Pujanamaham Karishyami।

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-atma-shodha.title: Dhanvantari Atma-Shodhan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-atma-shodha.text:
Om Apavitrah Pavitro Va Sarvavastham Gatoapi Va।
Yah Smaret Pundarikaksham Sa Bahyabhyantarah Shuchih॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dhyana-mant.title: Dhanvantari Dhyana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dhyana-mant.text:
Chaturbhujam Pita-Vastram Sarvalankara-Shobhitam।
Dhyaye Dhanvantarim Devam Surasura-Namaskritam॥1॥
Yuvanam Pundarikaksham Sarvabharana-Bhushitam।
Dadhanamamritasyaiva Kamandalum Shriya-Yutam॥2॥
Yagya-Bhoga-Bhujam Devam Surasura-Namaskritam।
Dhyaye Dhanvantarim Devam Shvetambara-Dharam Shubham॥3॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-avahana-man.title: Dhanvantari Avahana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-avahana-man.text:
Agachchha Deva-Devesha! Tejorashe Jagatpate!
Kriyamanam Maya Pujam Grihana Sura-Sattama!
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devam Avahayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pushpanjali.title: Dhanvantari Pushpanjali (Asana) Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pushpanjali.text:
Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam, Karta-Swara-Vibhushitam।
Asanam Deva-Devesha! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-padya-samar.title: Dhanvantari Padya Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-padya-samar.text:
Padyam Grihana Devesha, Sarva-Kshema-Samartha, Bhoh!
Bhaktya Samarpitam Deva, Lokanatha! Namoastu Te॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Padyam Namah॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-arghya-sama.title: Dhanvantari Arghya-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-arghya-sama.text:
Namaste Deva-Devesha! Namaste Dharani-Dhara!
Namaste Jagadadhara! Arghyoayam Prati-Grihyatam।
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam, Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam।
Grihana Toyamarghyartham, Parameshwara Vatsala!
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Arghyam Swaha॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-gandha-chan.title: Dhanvantari Gandha / Chandan-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-gandha-chan.text:
Shri-Khanda-Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam।
Vilepanam Sura-Shreshtha! Chandanam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Chandanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pushpa-sama.title: Dhanvantari Pushpa-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pushpa-sama.text:
Sevantika-Vakula-Champaka-Patabjaih, Punnaga-Jati-Karavira-Rasala-Pushpaih।
Vilva-Pravala-Tulasi-Dala-Mallikabhistvam, Pujayami Jagadishwara! Me Prasida॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dhoop-samar.title: Dhanvantari Dhoop-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dhoop-samar.text:
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah।
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam, Dhupoayam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Dhoopam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-deep-samarp.title: Dhanvantari Deep-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-deep-samarp.text:
Sajyam Varti-Samyuktam Cha Vahnina Yojitam Maya,
Deepam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham।
Bhaktya Deepam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane।
Trahi Maam Nirayad Ghoraddipoayam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Deepam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-naivedya-sa.title: Dhanvantari Naivedya-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-naivedya-sa.text:
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha।
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Prati-Grihyatam।
॥Yathamshatah Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami-
Om Pranaya Swaha। Om Apanaya Swaha। Om Vyanaya Swaha।
Om Udanaya Swaha। Om Samanaya Swaha॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-achamana-ja.title: Dhanvantari Achamana / Jal-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-achamana-ja.text:
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam।
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami। Mukha-Prakshalanam।
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami।

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-tambula-sam.title: Dhanvantari Tambula-Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-tambula-sam.text:
Poogi-Phalam Maha-Divyam Naga-Valli-Dalairyutam।
Karpuraila-Samayuktam Tambulam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Mukha-Vasartham Poogi-Phala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dakshina-ma.title: Dhanvantari Dakshina Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-dakshina-ma.text:
Hiranya-Garbha-Garbhastham Hema-Vijam Vibhavasoh।
Ananta-Punya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pradakshina.title: Dhanvantari Pradakshina Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-pradakshina.text:
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha।
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade॥
Anyatha Sharanam Nasti Tvameva Sharanam Prabho!
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Pradakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-vandana-sah.title: Dhanvantari Vandana-Sahita Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-vandana-sah.text:
Kara-Kritam Va Kayajam Karmajam Va, Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham।
Viditamaviditam Va Sarvametat Kshamasva, Jai Jai Karunabdhe, Shri Maha Deva Shambho!
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devatayai Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-sashtanga-p.title: Dhanvantari Sashtanga-Pranam Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-sashtanga-p.text:
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave।
Sashtangoayam Prayatnena Maya Kritah॥
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave।

mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-kshama-prar.title: Dhanvantari Kshama-Prarthana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-kshama-prar.text:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam।
Puja-Karma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
Mantra-Hinam Kriya-Hinam Bhakti-Hinam Sureshwara!
Maya Yat-Pujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me॥
Aparadha-Sahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya।
Dasoahamiti Maam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara।
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam।
Rupam Dehi, Jayam Dehi, Yasho Dehi, Dwisho Jahi॥
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yagya-Kriyadishu।
Nyunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam॥
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shri Dhanvantari-Devah Priyatam।
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devarpanamastu॥

mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-dhyana-mant.title: Shri Kubera Dhyana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-dhyana-mant.text:
मनुज-बाह्य-विमान-स्थितम्,
गरुड-रत्न-निभं निधि-नायकम्।
शिव-सखं मुकुटादि-विभूषितम्,
वर-गदे दधतं भजे तुन्दिलम्॥
Manuj-Brahma-Viman-Sthitam,
Garuda-Ratna-Nibham Nidhi-Naykam।
Shiva-Sakham Mukutadi-Vibhushitam,
Vara-Gade Dadhatam Bhaje Tundilam॥

mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-avahana-man.title: Shri Kubera Avahana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-avahana-man.text:
आवाहयामि देव! त्वामिहायाहि कृपां कुरु।
कोशं वर्द्धय नित्यं त्वं परि-रक्ष सुरेश्वर॥
॥श्रीकुबेर-देवम् आवाहयामि॥
Avahayami Deva! Tvamihayahi Kripam Kuru।
Kosham Varddhaya Nityam Tvam Pari-Raksha Sureshwara॥
॥ Shri Kuber-Devam Avahayami ॥

mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-pushpanjali.title: Shri Kubera Pushpanjali Asana Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-pushpanjali.text:
नाना-रत्न-समायुक्तं कार्त्त-स्वर-विभूषितम्।
आसनं देव-देवेश! प्रीत्यर्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
॥श्रीकुबेर-देवाय आसनार्थे पञ्च-पुष्पाणि समर्पयामि॥
Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam Kartta-Swara-Vibhushitam।
Asanam Deva-Devesha! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥ Shri Kuber-Devaya Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami ॥

mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-nav-upchara.title: Shri Kubera Nav Upchara Pujan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-nav-upchara.text:
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः पादयोः पाद्यं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः शिरसि अर्घ्यं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः गन्धाक्षतान् समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः पुष्पं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः धूपम् आघ्रापयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः दीपं दर्शयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः नैवेद्यं निवेदयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः आचमनीयं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः ताम्बूलं समर्पयामि।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Gandhakshatan Samarpayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Pushpam Samarpayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dipam Darshayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Tambulam Samarpayami।

mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-puja-samarp.title: Shri Kubera Puja Samarpan Mantra
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-puja-samarp.text:
ॐ श्रीकुबेराय नमः।
अनेन पूजनेन श्रीधनाध्यक्षः श्रीकुबेरः प्रीयताम्।
नमो नमः।
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha।
Anena Pujanena Shri Dhanadhyakshah Shri Kuberah Priyatam।
Namo Namah।

mantra:diwali:lakshmi-chalisa-opening-ve.title: Lakshmi Chalisa (opening verse)
mantra:diwali:lakshmi-chalisa-opening-ve.text:
Sindu Suta Main Sumirau Tohi।
Gyan, Buddhi, Vidya Do Mohi॥
Tum Samaan Nahi Koi Upkari।
Sab Vidhi Puravahu Aas Hamari॥

mantra:diwali:shree-mahalakshmi-suktam-o.title: Shree Mahalakshmi Suktam (opening verse)
mantra:diwali:shree-mahalakshmi-suktam-o.text:
Harih Om Hirannya-Varnnaam Harinniim
Suvarnna-Rajata-Srajaam।
Candraam Hirannmayiim Lakssmiim
Jatavedo Ma Aavaha॥1॥

mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-achamana-.title: Dhanvantari Puja Achamana Mantra
mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-achamana-.text:
Om Atma-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।
Om Vidya-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।
Om Shiva-Tattvam Shodhayami Swaha।

mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-sankalpa-.title: Dhanvantari Puja Sankalpa Mantra
mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-sankalpa-.text:
Om Tatsat Adyaitasya Brahmanoahni Dwitiya-Prahararddhe Shveta-Varaha-Kalpe
Jambu-Dvipe Bharata-Khande Amuka-Pradeshe Amuka-Punya-Kshetre Kaliyuge
Kali-Prathama-Charane Amuka-Samvatsare Kartika-Mase Krishna-Pakshe
Trayodashi-Tithau Amuka-Vasare Amuka-Gotrotpanno Amuka-Nama-Aham
Shri Dhanvantari-Devata-Priti-Purvakam Ayushya-Arogya-Eshvarya-Abhivriddhyartham
Shri Dhanvantari-Pujanamaham Karishyami।

mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-atma-shod.title: Dhanvantari Puja Atma-Shodhan Mantra
mantra:diwali:dhanvantari-puja-atma-shod.text:
Om Apavitrah Pavitro Va Sarvavastham Gatoapi Va।
Yah Smaret Pundarikaksham Sa Bahyabhyantarah Shuchih॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dhyana-ma.title: Shri Dhanvantari Dhyana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dhyana-ma.text:
Chaturbhujam Pita-Vastram Sarvalankara-Shobhitam।
Dhyaye Dhanvantarim Devam Surasura-Namaskritam॥1॥
Yuvanam Pundarikaksham Sarvabharana-Bhushitam।
Dadhanamamritasyaiva Kamandalum Shriya-Yutam॥2॥
Yagya-Bhoga-Bhujam Devam Surasura-Namaskritam।
Dhyaye Dhanvantarim Devam Shvetambara-Dharam Shubham॥3॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-avahana-m.title: Shri Dhanvantari Avahana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-avahana-m.text:
Agachchha Deva-Devesha! Tejorashe Jagatpate!
Kriyamanam Maya Pujam Grihana Sura-Sattama!
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devam Avahayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-asana-pus.title: Shri Dhanvantari Asana / Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-asana-pus.text:
Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam, Karta-Swara-Vibhushitam।
Asanam Deva-Devesha! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-padya-sam.title: Shri Dhanvantari Padya Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-padya-sam.text:
Padyam Grihana Devesha, Sarva-Kshema-Samartha, Bhoh!
Bhaktya Samarpitam Deva, Lokanatha! Namoastu Te॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Padyam Namah॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-arghya-sa.title: Shri Dhanvantari Arghya Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-arghya-sa.text:
Namaste Deva-Devesha! Namaste Dharani-Dhara!
Namaste Jagadadhara! Arghyoayam Prati-Grihyatam।
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam, Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam।
Grihana Toyamarghyartham, Parameshwara Vatsala!
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Arghyam Swaha॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-chandan-s.title: Shri Dhanvantari Chandan Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-chandan-s.text:
Shri-Khanda-Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam।
Vilepanam Sura-Shreshtha! Chandanam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Chandanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-pushpa-sa.title: Shri Dhanvantari Pushpa Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-pushpa-sa.text:
Sevantika-Vakula-Champaka-Patabjaih, Punnaga-Jati-Karavira-Rasala-Pushpaih।
Vilva-Pravala-Tulasi-Dala-Mallikabhistvam, Pujayami Jagadishwara! Me Prasida॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dhoop-sam.title: Shri Dhanvantari Dhoop Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dhoop-sam.text:
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah।
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam, Dhupoayam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Dhoopam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-deep-sama.title: Shri Dhanvantari Deep Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-deep-sama.text:
Sajyam Varti-Samyuktam Cha Vahnina Yojitam Maya,
Deepam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham।
Bhaktya Deepam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane।
Trahi Maam Nirayad Ghoraddipoayam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Deepam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-naivedya-.title: Shri Dhanvantari Naivedya Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-naivedya-.text:
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha।
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Prati-Grihyatam।
॥Yathamshatah Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami-
Om Pranaya Swaha। Om Apanaya Swaha। Om Vyanaya Swaha।
Om Udanaya Swaha। Om Samanaya Swaha॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-achamana-.title: Shri Dhanvantari Achamana/Jal Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-achamana-.text:
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam।
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami। Mukha-Prakshalanam।
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami।

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-tambula-s.title: Shri Dhanvantari Tambula Samarpan Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-tambula-s.text:
Poogi-Phalam Maha-Divyam Naga-Valli-Dalairyutam।
Karpuraila-Samayuktam Tambulam Prati-Grihyatam॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Mukha-Vasartham Poogi-Phala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dakshina-.title: Shri Dhanvantari Dakshina Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dakshina-.text:
Hiranya-Garbha-Garbhastham Hema-Vijam Vibhavasoh।
Ananta-Punya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-pradakshi.title: Shri Dhanvantari Pradakshina Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-pradakshi.text:
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha।
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade॥
Anyatha Sharanam Nasti Tvameva Sharanam Prabho!
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Pradakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-vandana-s.title: Shri Dhanvantari Vandana-Sahita Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-vandana-s.text:
Kara-Kritam Va Kayajam Karmajam Va, Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham।
Viditamaviditam Va Sarvametat Kshamasva, Jai Jai Karunabdhe, Shri Maha Deva Shambho!
॥Shri Dhanvantari Devatayai Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-sashtanga.title: Shri Dhanvantari Sashtanga-Pranam Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-sashtanga.text:
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave।
Sashtangoayam Prayatnena Maya Kritah॥
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave।

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-kshama-pr.title: Shri Dhanvantari Kshama-Prarthana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-kshama-pr.text:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam।
Puja-Karma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
Mantra-Hinam Kriya-Hinam Bhakti-Hinam Sureshwara!
Maya Yat-Pujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me॥
Aparadha-Sahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya।
Dasoahamiti Maam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara।
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam।
Rupam Dehi, Jayam Dehi, Yasho Dehi, Dwisho Jahi॥
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yagya-Kriyadishu।
Nyunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam॥
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shri Dhanvantari-Devah Priyatam।
॥Shri Dhanvantari-Devarpanamastu॥

mantra:diwali:shri-kali-dhyana-mantra.title: Shri Kali Dhyana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-dhyana-mantra.text:
ॐ सद्यश्छिन्नशिरः कृपाणमभयं हस्तैर्वरं बिभ्रतीं।
घोरास्यां शिरसां स्रजं सुरुचिरां उन्मुक्तकेशावलिम्॥
सृक्कासृक्प्रवहां श्मशाननिलयां श्रुत्योः शवालङ्कृतिं।
श्यामाङ्गीं कृत-मेखलां शव-करैर्देवीं भजे कालिकाम्॥

mantra:diwali:shri-kali-avahana-mantra.title: Shri Kali Avahana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-avahana-mantra.text:
ॐ देवेशि! भक्ति सुलभे! परिवारसमिन्वते!
यावत् त्वां पूजयिष्यामि तवात् त्वं सुस्थिरा भव॥
दुष्पारे घोर-संसार-सागरे पतितं सदा।
त्रायस्व वरदे देवि! नमस्ते चित्-परात्मिके॥
ये देवा याश्च देव्यश्च चलितायां चलन्ति हि।
आवाहयामि तान् सर्वान् कालिके परमेश्वरि॥
प्राणान् रक्ष यशो रक्ष रक्ष दारान् सुतान् धनम्।
सर्व-रक्षा-करी यस्मात् त्वं हि देवि जगन्मये॥
प्रविश्य तिष्ठ यज्ञेऽस्मिन् यावत् पूजां करोम्यहम्।
सर्वानन्द-करे देवि! सर्वसिद्धिं प्रयच्छ मे॥
तिष्ठात्र कालिके मातः! सर्व-कल्याण-हेतवे।
पूजां गृहाण सुमुखि! नमस्ते शङ्कर-प्रिये॥
॥ श्रीमहा-काली-देवीम् आवाहयामि॥

mantra:diwali:shri-kali-pushpanjali-asan.title: Shri Kali Pushpanjali Asana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-pushpanjali-asan.text:
नाना-रत्न-समायुक्तं कार्तस्वर-विभूषितम्।
आसनं देवि देवेशि! प्रीत्यर्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
॥ श्रीमहा-काली-दैव्यै आसनार्थे पञ्च-पुष्पाणि समर्पयामि॥

mantra:diwali:shri-kali-navopachara-puja.title: Shri Kali Navopachara Puja Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-navopachara-puja.text:
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः पादयोः पाद्यं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः शिरसि अर्घ्यं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः गन्धाक्षतान् समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः पुष्पं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः धूपम् आघ्रापयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः दीपं दर्शयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः नैवेद्यं निवेदयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः आचमनीयं समर्पयामि।
ॐ श्रीकाली-देव्यै नमः ताम्बूलं समर्पयामि।

mantra:diwali:shri-kali-puja-samarpana-m.title: Shri Kali Puja Samarpana Mantra
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-puja-samarpana-m.text:
ॐ श्रीमहाकाल्यै नमः।
अनेन पूजनेन श्रीकाली देवी प्रीयताम्।
नमो नमः।

mantra:diwali:deep-malika-dhyana-mantra.title: Deep Malika Dhyana Mantra
mantra:diwali:deep-malika-dhyana-mantra.text:
भो दीप! ब्रह्मरूपस्त्वं ह्यन्धकार-विनाशकः।
गृहाण मया कृतां पूजाम् ओजस्तेजः प्रवर्धय॥

mantra:diwali:deep-malika-prarthana-mant.title: Deep Malika Prarthana Mantra
mantra:diwali:deep-malika-prarthana-mant.text:
शुभं करोतु कल्याणमारोग्यं सुख-सम्पदम्।
मम बुद्धि-प्रकाशं च दीप-ज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तु ते॥
शुभं भवतु कल्याणमारोग्यं पुष्टि-वर्धनम्।
आत्म-तत्त्व-प्रबोधाय दीप-ज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तु ते॥
दीपावलिर्मया दत्ता गृहाण त्वं सुरेश्वरि!
अनेन दीप-दानेन ज्ञान-दृष्टि-प्रदा भव॥

mantra:diwali:lakshmi-mantra.title: Lakshmi Mantra
mantra:diwali:lakshmi-mantra.text: Om Shreem Hreem Shreem Mahalakshmiyei Namah

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhyana-and-avaha.title: Shri Durga Dhyana and Avahana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhyana-and-avaha.text:
सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ब्रह्मरूपे सदानन्दे परमानन्दस्वरूपिणि।
द्रुतसिद्धिप्रदे देवि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
शरणागतदीनार्तपरित्राणपरायणे।
सर्वस्यार्त्तिहरे देवि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः दुर्गादेवीम् आवाहयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhyana-and-avaha.title: Shri Durga Dhyana and Avahana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhyana-and-avaha.text:
Sarvamangalamangalye Shive Sarvarthasadhike।
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namoastu Te॥
Brahmarupe Sadanande Paramanandasvarupini।
Drutasiddhiprade Devi Narayani Namoastu Te॥
Sharanagatadinartaparitranaparayane।
Sarvasyarttihare Devi Narayani Namoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Durgadevim Avahayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra.title: Shri Durga Asana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra.text:
अनेकरत्नसंयुक्तं नानामणिगणान्वितम्।
कार्तस्वरमयं दिव्यमासनं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः आसनं कल्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra-tra.title: Shri Durga Asana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra-tra.text:
Anekaratnasamyuktam Nanamanigananvitam।
Kartasvaramayam Divyamasanam Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Asanam Kalpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-padya-prakshalan.title: Shri Durga Padya Prakshalana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-padya-prakshalan.text:
गङ्गादिसर्वतीर्थेभ्यो मया प्रार्थनयाहृतम्।
तोयमेतत्सुखस्पर्शं पाद्यार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः पाद्यं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-padya-prakshalan.title: Shri Durga Padya Prakshalana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-padya-prakshalan.text:
Gangadisarvatirthebhyo Maya Prarthanayahritam।
Toyametatsukhasparsham Padyartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Padyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-arghya-samarpana.title: Shri Durga Arghya Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-arghya-samarpana.text:
गन्धपुष्पाक्षतैर्युक्तमर्घ्यं सम्पादितं मया।
गृहाण त्वं महादेवि प्रसन्ना भव सर्वदा॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः अर्घ्यं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-arghya-samarpana.title: Shri Durga Arghya Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-arghya-samarpana.text:
Gandhapushpakshatairyuktamarghyam Sampaditam Maya।
Grihana Tvam Mahadevi Prasanna Bhava Sarvada॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Arghyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Achamana Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-samarpa.text:
आचम्यतां त्वया देवि भक्तिं मे ह्यचलां कुरु।
ईप्सितं मे वरं देहि परत्र च परां गतिम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः आचमनीयं जलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Achamana Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-samarpa.text:
Achamyatam Tvaya Devi Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru।
Ipsitam Me Varam Dehi Paratra Cha Param Gatim॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra.title: Shri Durga Snana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra.text:
पयोदधि घृतं क्षीरं सितया च समन्वितम्।
पञ्चामृतमनेनाद्य कुरु स्नानं दयानिधे॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः स्नानीयं जलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra-tra.title: Shri Durga Snana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra-tra.text:
Payodadhi Ghritam Kshiram Sitaya Cha Samanvitam।
Panchamritamanenadya Kuru Snanam Dayanidhe॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Snaniyam Jalam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-vastra-samarpana.title: Shri Durga Vastra Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-vastra-samarpana.text:
वस्त्रं च सोमदैवत्यं लज्जायास्तु निवारणम्।
मया निवेदितं भक्त्या गृहाण परमेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः वस्त्रं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-vastra-samarpana.title: Shri Durga Vastra Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-vastra-samarpana.text:
Vastram Cha Somadaivatyam Lajjayastu Nivaranam।
Maya Niveditam Bhaktya Grihana Parameshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Vastram Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-abhushana-samarp.title: Shri Durga Abhushana Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-abhushana-samarp.text:
हारकङ्कणकेयूर-मेखलाकुण्डलादिभिः।
रत्नाढ्यं कुण्डलोपेतं भूषणं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः आभूषणं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-abhushana-samarp.title: Shri Durga Abhushana Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-abhushana-samarp.text:
Harakankanakeyura-Mekhalakundaladibhih।
Ratnadhyam Kundalopetam Bhushanam Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Abhushanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-chandana-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Chandana Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-chandana-samarpa.text:
परमानन्दसौभाग्यं परिपूर्णं दिगन्तरे।
गृहाण परमं गन्धं कृपया परमेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः चन्दनं विलेपयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-chandana-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Chandana Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-chandana-samarpa.text:
Paramanandasaubhagyam Paripurnam Digantare।
Grihana Paramam Gandham Kripaya Parameshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Chandanam Vilepayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kumkuma-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Kumkuma Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kumkuma-samarpan.text:
कुङ्कुमं कान्तिदं दिव्यं कामिनीकामसम्भवम्।
कुङ्कुमेनार्चिते देवि प्रसीद परमेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः कुङ्कुमं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kumkuma-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Kumkuma Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kumkuma-samarpan.text:
Kumkumam Kantidam Divyam Kaminikamasambhavam।
Kumkumenarchite Devi Prasida Parameshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Kumkumam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kajjala-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Kajjala Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kajjala-samarpan.text:
कज्जलं कज्जलं रम्यं सुभगे शान्तिकारिके।
कर्पूरज्योतिरुत्पन्नं गृहाण परमेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः कज्जलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kajjala-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Kajjala Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kajjala-samarpan.text:
Kajjalam Kajjalam Ramyam Subhage Shantikarike।
Karpurajyotirutpannam Grihana Parameshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Kajjalam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-saubhagya-sutra-.title: Shri Durga Saubhagya Sutra Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-saubhagya-sutra-.text:
सौभाग्यसूत्रं वरदे सुवर्णमणिसंयुते।
कण्ठे बध्नामि देवेशि सौभाग्यं देहि मे सदा॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः सौभाग्यसूत्रं बध्नामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-saubhagya-sutra-.title: Shri Durga Saubhagya Sutra Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-saubhagya-sutra-.text:
Saubhagyasutram Varade Suvarnamanisamyute।
Kanthe Badhnami Deveshi Saubhagyam Dehi Me Sada॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Saubhagyasutram Badhnami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-sugandhita-dravy.title: Shri Durga Sugandhita Dravya Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-sugandhita-dravy.text:
चन्दनागरुकर्पूरैः संयुतं कुङ्कुमं तथा।
कस्तूर्यादिसुगन्धाश्च सर्वाङ्गेषु विलेपनम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः सुगन्धितद्रव्यं विलेपयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-sugandhita-dravy.title: Shri Durga Sugandhita Dravya Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-sugandhita-dravy.text:
Chandanagarukarpuraih Samyutam Kunkumam Tatha।
Kasturyadisugandhashcha Sarvangeshu Vilepanam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Sugandhitadravyam Vilepayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-haridra-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Haridra Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-haridra-samarpan.text:
हरिद्रारञ्जिते देवि सुखसौभाग्यदायिनी।
तस्मात्त्वां पूजयाम्यत्र सुखशान्तिं प्रयच्छ मे॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः हरिद्राचूर्णं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-haridra-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Haridra Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-haridra-samarpan.text:
Haridraranjite Devi Sukhasaubhagyadayini।
Tasmattvam Pujayamyatra Sukhashantim Prayaccha Me॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Haridrachurnam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-akshata-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Akshata Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-akshata-samarpan.text:
रञ्जिताः कुङ्कुमौद्येन न अक्षताश्चातिशोभनाः।
ममैषां देवि दानेन प्रसन्ना भव शोभने॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः अक्षतान् समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-akshata-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Akshata Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-akshata-samarpan.text:
Ranjitah Kunkumaudyena Na Akshatashchatishobhanah।
Mamaisham Devi Danena Prasanna Bhava Shobhane॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Akshatan Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pushpanjali-mant.title: Shri Durga Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pushpanjali-mant.text:
मन्दारपारिजातादि-पाटलीकेतकानि च।
जातीचम्पकपुष्पाणि गृहाणेमानि शोभने॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः पुष्पाञ्जलिं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pushpanjali-mant.title: Shri Durga Pushpanjali Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pushpanjali-mant.text:
Mandaraparijatadi-Pataliketakani Cha।
Jatichampakapushpani Grihanemani Shobhane॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Pushpanjalim Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-bilvapatra-mantr.title: Shri Durga Bilvapatra Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-bilvapatra-mantr.text:
अमृतोद्भव-श्रीवृक्षो महादेवि! प्रियः सदा।
बिल्वपत्रं प्रयच्छामि पवित्रं ते सुरेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः बिल्वपत्राणि समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-bilvapatra-mantr.title: Shri Durga Bilvapatra Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-bilvapatra-mantr.text:
Amritodbhava-Shrivriksho Mahadevi! Priyah Sada।
Bilvapatram Prayacchami Pavitram Te Sureshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Bilvapatrani Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpana-.title: Shri Durga Dhupa Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpana-.text:
दशाङ्गगुग्गुलं धूपं चन्दनागरुसंयुतम्।
समर्पितं मया भक्त्या महादेवि! प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः धूपमाघ्रापयमि।

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpana-.title: Shri Durga Dhupa Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpana-.text:
Dashangaguggulam Dhupam Chandanagarusamyutam।
Samarpitam Maya Bhaktya Mahadevi! Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Dhupamaghrapayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-samarpana-m.title: Shri Durga Dipa Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-samarpana-m.text:
घृतवर्त्तिसमायुक्तं महातेजो महोज्ज्वलम्।
दीपं दास्यामि देवेशि! सुप्रीता भव सर्वदा॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः दीपं दर्शयामि।

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-samarpana-m.title: Shri Durga Dipa Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-samarpana-m.text:
Ghritavarttisamayuktam Mahatejo Mahojjvalam।
Dipam Dasyami Deveshi! Suprita Bhava Sarvada॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Dipam Darshayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-naivedya-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Naivedya Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-naivedya-samarpa.text:
अन्नं चतुर्विधं स्वादु रसैः षड्भिः समन्वितम्।
नैवेद्यं गृह्यतां देवि! भक्तिं मे ह्यचलां कुरु॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः नैवेद्यं निवेदयामि।

mantra:durga:shri-durga-naivedya-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Naivedya Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-naivedya-samarpa.text:
Annam Chaturvidham Svadu Rasaih Shadbhih Samanvitam।
Naivedyam Grihyatam Devi! Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Naivedyam Nivedayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-rituphala-mantra.title: Shri Durga Rituphala Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-rituphala-mantra.text:
द्राक्षाखर्जूरकदली-फलसाम्रकपित्थकम्।
नारिकेलेक्षुजम्ब्वादि-फलानि प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः ऋतुफलानि समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-rituphala-mantra.title: Shri Durga Rituphala Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-rituphala-mantra.text:
Drakshakharjurakadali-Phalasamrakapitthakam।
Narikelekshujambvadi-Phalani Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Rituphalani Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra.title: Shri Durga Achamana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra.text:
कामारिवल्लभे देवि कुर्वाचमनमम्बिके।
निरन्तरमहं वन्दे चरणौ तव चण्डिके॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः आचमनीयं जलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra-.title: Shri Durga Achamana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra-.text:
Kamarivallabhe Devi Kurvachamanamambike।
Nirantaramaham Vande Charanau Tava Chandike॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-narikela-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Narikela Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-narikela-samarpa.text:
नारिकेलं च नारङ्गीं कलिङ्गमञ्जिरं त्वया।
उर्वारुकं च देवेशि फलान्येतानि गृह्यताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः नारिकेलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-narikela-samarpa.title: Shri Durga Narikela Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-narikela-samarpa.text:
Narikelam Cha Narangim Kalingamanjiram Tvaya।
Urvarukam Cha Deveshi Phalanyetani Grihyatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Narikelam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-tambula-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Tambula Samarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-tambula-samarpan.text:
एलालवङ्गं कस्तूरी कर्पूरैः पुष्पवासिताम्।
वीटिकां मुखवासार्थं समर्पयामि सुरेश्वरि॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः ताम्बूलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-tambula-samarpan.title: Shri Durga Tambula Samarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-tambula-samarpan.text:
Elalavangam Kasturi Karpuraih Pushpavasitam।
Vitikam Mukhavasartham Samarpayami Sureshwari॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Tambulam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra.title: Shri Durga Dakshina Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra.text:
पूजाफलसमृद्धयर्थं तवाग्रे स्वर्णमीश्वरी।
स्थापितं तेन मे प्रीता पूर्णान् कुरु मनोरथम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः दक्षिणां समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra-.title: Shri Durga Dakshina Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra-.text:
Pujaphalasamriddhayartham Tavagre Svarnamishwari।
Sthapitam Tena Me Prita Purnan Kuru Manoratham॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Dakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-man.title: Shri Durga Pustaka Puja Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-man.text:
नमो देव्यै महादेव्यै शिवायै सततं नमः।
नमः प्रकृत्यै भद्रायै नियताः प्रणताः स्मताम्॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः पुस्तकं पूजयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-man.title: Shri Durga Pustaka Puja Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-man.text:
Namo Devyai Mahadevyai Shivayai Satatam Namah।
Namah Prakrityai Bhadrayai Niyatah Pranatah Smatam॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Pustakam Pujayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-mant.title: Shri Durga Dipa Pujana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-mant.text:
शुभं भवतु कल्याणमारोग्यं पुष्टिवर्द्धनम्।
आत्मतत्त्वप्रबोधाय दीपज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः दीपं पूजयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-mant.title: Shri Durga Dipa Pujana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-mant.text:
Shubham Bhavatu Kalyanamarogyam Pushtivardhanam।
Atmatattvaprabodhaya Dipajyotirnamoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Dipam Pujayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-man.title: Shri Durga Kanya Pujana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-man.text:
सर्वस्वरूपे! सर्वेशे सर्वशक्ति स्वरूपिणी।
पूजां गृहाण कौमारि! जगन्मातर्नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः कन्यां पूजयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-man.title: Shri Durga Kanya Pujana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-man.text:
Sarvasvarupe! Sarveshe Sarvashakti Svarupini।
Pujam Grihana Kaumari! Jaganmatarnamoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Kanyam Pujayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra.title: Shri Durga Nirajana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra.text:
नीराजनं सुमाङ्गल्यं कर्पूरेण समन्वितम्।
चन्द्रार्कवह्निसदृशं महादेवि! नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः कर्पूरनीराजनं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra-.title: Shri Durga Nirajana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra-.text:
Nirajanam Sumangalyam Karpurena Samanvitam।
Chandrarkavahnisadrisham Mahadevi! Namoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Karpuranirajanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pradakshina-mant.title: Shri Durga Pradakshina Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pradakshina-mant.text:
प्रदक्षिणं त्रयं देवि प्रयत्नेन प्रकल्पितम्।
पश्याद्य पावने देवि अम्बिकायै नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः प्रदक्षिणां समर्पयामि॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-pradakshina-mant.title: Shri Durga Pradakshina Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pradakshina-mant.text:
Pradakshinam Trayam Devi Prayatnena Prakalpitam।
Pashyadya Pavane Devi Ambikayai Namoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Pradakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kshamarpana-mant.title: Shri Durga Kshamarpana Mantra
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kshamarpana-mant.text:
अपराधशतं देवि मत्कृतं च दिने दिने।
क्षम्यतां पावने देवि देवेशि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः दुर्गादेव्यै नमः अपराधान् क्षमस्व॥

mantra:durga:shri-durga-kshamarpana-mant.title: Shri Durga Kshamarpana Mantra (transliteration)
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kshamarpana-mant.text:
Aparadhashatam Devi Matkritam Cha Dine Dine।
Kshamyatam Pavane Devi Deveshi Namoastu Te॥
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Durgadevyai Namah
Aparadhan Kshamaswa॥

mantra:durga:durga-homa-sankalpa.title: Durga Homa Sankalpa
mantra:durga:durga-homa-sankalpa.text: भूलोके धर्म स्थापनार्थम् सर्वेषाम् जनानाम् सुख शान्ति सिद्ध्यर्थम् दुर्गा होमकर्म यथाशक्ति करिष्ये

mantra:durga:durga-homa-prajapati-ahuti.title: Durga Homa Prajapati Ahuti
mantra:durga:durga-homa-prajapati-ahuti.text: ॐ प्रजापतये स्वाहा, इदम् प्रजापतये न मम।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-indra-ahuti.title: Durga Homa Indra Ahuti
mantra:durga:durga-homa-indra-ahuti.text: ॐ इन्द्राय स्वाहा, इदम् इन्द्रयै न मम।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-agni-ahuti.title: Durga Homa Agni Ahuti
mantra:durga:durga-homa-agni-ahuti.text: ॐ अग्नये स्वाहा, इदं अग्नये न मम।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-soma-ahuti.title: Durga Homa Soma Ahuti
mantra:durga:durga-homa-soma-ahuti.text: ॐ सोमाय स्वाहा, इदं सोमाय न मम।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-durga-ahuti-mant.title: Durga Homa Durga Ahuti Mantra (2)
mantra:durga:durga-homa-durga-ahuti-mant.text: ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं दुं दुर्गायै नमः स्वाहा।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-durga-ahuti-mant.title: Durga Homa Durga Ahuti Mantra (3)
mantra:durga:durga-homa-durga-ahuti-mant.text: ॐ दुर्गायै दुर्गपारायै सारायै सर्वकारिण्यै। ख्यात्यै तथैव कृष्णायै धूम्रा सततं नमः॥ स्वाहा।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-purnahuti-mantra.title: Durga Homa Purnahuti Mantra
mantra:durga:durga-homa-purnahuti-mantra.text: ॐ ह्रीं दुं दुर्गायै नमः स्वाहा।

mantra:durga:durga-homa-dhyana-shloka.title: Durga Homa Dhyana Shloka
mantra:durga:durga-homa-dhyana-shloka.text:
सिंहस्था शशिशेखरा मरकतप्रख्ययैश्चतुर्भिर्भूयै।
शङ्खं चक्रधनुःशरांश्चर दधती नेत्रैस्त्रिभिः शोभिता।
आमुक्ताङ्गदहारकङ्कणरणत्काञ्चीरणन्नूपुरा।
दुर्गा दुर्गतिहारिणी भवतु नो रत्‍‌नोल्लसत्कुण्डला॥

mantra:durga:maha-ashtami-mantra-ya-devi.title: Maha Ashtami Mantra (Ya Devi Sarva Bhuteshu)
mantra:durga:maha-ashtami-mantra-ya-devi.text:
Ya Devi Sarva Bhuteshu, Shakti Rupena Samsthita
Namastasyai Namastasyai Namastasyai Namo Namah

mantra:durga:navarna-mantra-chamunda-bee.title: Navarna Mantra (Chamunda Beej Mantra)
mantra:durga:navarna-mantra-chamunda-bee.text: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:vakratunda-mahak.title: Vakratunda Mahakaya
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:vakratunda-mahak.text: Vakratunda Mahakaya Koti Surya Samaprabha, Nirvighnam Kurume Deva Sarva Karyeshu Sarvada

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:gajananam-bhutag.title: Gajananam Bhutaganadi Sevitam
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:gajananam-bhutag.text:
Om Gajaananam Bhuta Ganaadi Sevitam
Kapitta Jambuu Phala Saar Pakshitam
Umasutam Shoka Vinaasha Kaaranam
Namami Vighneshwara Paada Pankajam

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:shuklambaradhara.title: Shuklambaradharam Vishnum
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:shuklambaradhara.text:
Shuklambharadharam Vishnum Shashi Varnam Chaturbhujam
Prasanna Vadanam Dhyayet Sarva Vighnopa Shantaye.

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Avahana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
हे हेरम्ब! त्वमेह्येहि ह्यम्बिकात्र्यम्बकात्मज।
सिद्धिबुद्धिपते त्र्यक्ष लक्षलाभपितुः पितः॥
नागास्यं नागहारं त्वां गणराजं चतुर्भुजम्।
भूषितं स्वायुधैर्दिव्यैः पाशाङ्कुशपरस्वधैः॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Pratishthapana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
अस्यै प्राणाः प्रतिष्ठन्तु अस्यै प्राणा क्षरन्तु च।
अस्यै देवत्वमर्चायै मामहेति च कश्चन॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सुप्रतिष्ठो वरदो भव॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Asana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
विचित्ररत्नखचितं दिव्यास्तरणसंयुतम्।
स्वर्णसिंहासनं चारु गृहाण गुहाग्रज॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
आसनं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Padya Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
ॐ सर्वतीर्थसमुद्भूतं पाद्यं गन्धादिभिर्युतम्।
गजानन गृहाणेदं भगवान् भक्तवत्सलः॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पादयोः पाद्यं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Arghya Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
ॐ गणाध्यक्ष नमस्तेऽस्तु गृहाण करुणाकर।
अर्घ्यं च फलसंयुक्तं गन्धमाल्याक्षतैर्युतम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
हस्तयोरर्घ्यं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Achamana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
विघ्नराज नमस्तुभ्यं त्रिदशैरभिवन्दित।
गङ्गोदकेन देवेश कुरुष्वाचमनं प्रभो॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मुखे आचमनीयं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
मन्दाकिन्यास्तु यद्वारि सर्वपापहरं शुभम्।
तदिदं कल्पितं देव स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सर्वाङ्गस्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Panchamrita Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
पञ्चामृतं मयाऽऽनीतं पयो दधि घृतं मधु।
शर्करा च समायुक्तं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पञ्चामृत-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Paya Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
कामधेनुसमुद्भूतं सर्वेषां जीवनं परम्।
तेजः पुष्टिकरं दिव्यं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पयः-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Dadhi Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
पयसस्तु समुद्भूतं मधुराम्लं शशिप्रभम्।
दध्यानीतं मया देव स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
दधि-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Ghrita Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
नवनीत-समुत्पन्नं सर्वसंतोषकारकम्।
घृतं तुभ्यं प्रदास्यामि स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
घृत-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Madhu Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
पुष्परेणुसमुद्भूतं सुस्वादु मधुरं मधु।
तेजः पुष्टिकरं दिव्यं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मधु-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Sharkara Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
इक्षुरससमुद्भूतां शर्करां पुष्टिदां शुभाम्।
मलापहारिकां दिव्यां स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
शर्करा-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Suvasita Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
चम्पाकाशेकबकुल-मालती-मोगरादिभिः।
वासितं स्निग्धताहेतुर्तैलं चारु प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सुवासित-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Shuddhodaka Snana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
गङ्गा च यमुना चैव गोदावरी सरस्वती।
नर्मदा-सिन्धु-कावेरी स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
शुद्धोदक-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Vastra Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
शीतवातोष्णसन्त्राणं लज्जाया रक्षणं परम्।
देहालङ्करणं वस्त्रमतः शान्तिं प्रयच्छ मे॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
वस्त्रं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Uttariya Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
उत्तरीयं तथा देव नानाचित्रितमुत्तमम्।
गृहाणेदं मया भक्त्या दत्तं तत् सफलीकुरु॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
उत्तरीयं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Yajnopavita Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
नवभिस्तन्तुभिर्युक्तं त्रिगुणं देवतामयम्।
उपवीतं मया दत्तं गृहाण परमेश्वर॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
यज्ञोपवीतं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Gandha Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
श्रीखण्डं चन्दनं दिव्यं गन्धाढ्यं सुमनोहरम्।
विलेपणं सुरश्रेष्ठ चन्दनं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
गन्धं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Akshata Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
अक्षताश्च सुरश्रेष्ठ कुङ्कुमाक्ताः सुशोभिताः।
मया निवेदिता भक्त्या गृहाण परमेश्वर॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
अक्षतान् समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Pushpa Mala Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
माल्यादीनि सुगन्धीनि माल्यत्यादीनि वै प्रभो।
मयाहृतानि पुष्पाणि गृह्यन्तां पूजनाय भोः॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पुष्पमालां समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Shami Patra Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
त्वत्प्रियाणि सुपुष्पाणि कोमलानि शुभानि वै।
शमीदलानि हेरम्ब गृहाण गणनायक॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
शमी-पत्राणि समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Durvankura Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
दूर्वाङ्कुरान् सुहरितानमृतान् मङ्गलप्रदान्।
आनीतांस्तव पूजार्थं गृहाण गणनायक॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
दूर्वाङ्कुरान् समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Sindura Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
सिन्दूरं शोभनं रक्तं सौभाग्यं सुखवर्धनम्।
शुभदं कामदं चैव सिन्दूरं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सिन्दूरं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Dhupa Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
वनस्पतिरसोद्भूतो गन्धाढ्यो गन्ध उत्तमः।
आघ्रेयः सर्वदेवानां धूपोऽयं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
धूपमाघ्रापयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Dipa Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
साज्यं त्रिवर्तिसंयुक्तं वह्निना योजितं मया।
दीपं गृहाण देवेश त्रैलोक्यतिमिरापहम्॥
भक्त्या दीपं प्रयच्छामि देवाय परमात्मने।
त्राहि मां नरकाद्घोराद्दीपज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तुते॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
दीपं दर्शयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Naivedya Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
नैवेद्यं गृह्यतां देव भक्तिं मे ह्यचलां कुरु।
ईप्सितं मे वरं देहि परत्र च परां गतिम्॥
शर्करा-खण्ड-खाद्यानि दधि-क्षीर-घृतानि च।
आहारं भक्ष्यभोज्यं च नैवेद्यं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
नैवेद्यं मोदकमयऋतुफलानि च समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Chandana Karodvartana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
चन्दनं मलयोद्भूतं कस्तूर्यादि-समन्वितम्।
करोद्वर्तनकं देव गृहाण परमेश्वर॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
चन्दनेन करोद्वर्तनं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Tambula Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
ॐ पूगीफलं महद्दिव्यं नागवल्लीदलैर्युतम्।
एलाचूर्णादिसंयुक्तं ताम्बूलं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मुख-वासार्थम्-एला-पूगी-फलादि-सहितं ताम्बूलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Narikela Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
इदं फलं मया देव स्थापितं पुरतस्तव।
तेन मे सफलावाप्तिर्भवेज्जन्मनि जन्मनि॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
नारिकेल-फलं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Dakshina Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
हिरण्यगर्भगर्भस्थं हेमबीजं विभावसोः।
अनन्तपुण्यफलदमतः शान्तिं प्रयच्छ मे॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
द्रव्य-दक्षिणां समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Nirajana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
कदलीगर्भसम्भूतं कर्पूरं तु प्रदीपितम्।
आरार्तिक्यमहं कुर्वे पश्य मे वरदो भव॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
कर्पूर-नीराजनं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
नानासुगन्धि-पुष्पाणि यथा कालोद्भवानि च।
पुष्पाञ्जलिं मया दत्तां गृहाण परमेश्वर॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मन्त्र-पुष्पाञ्जलिं समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Pradakshina Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
यानि कानि च पापानि ज्ञाताज्ञातकृतानि च।
तानि सर्वाणि नश्यन्ति प्रदक्षिणां पदे पदे॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
प्रदक्षिणां समर्पयामि॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Visarjana Mantra
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth.text:
आवाहनं न जानामि न जानामि तवार्चनम्।
पूजां चैव न जानामि क्षमस्व गणेश्वर॥
अन्यथा शरणं नास्ति त्वमेव शरणं मम।
तस्मात्कारुण्यभावेन रक्षस्व विघ्नेश्वर॥
गतं पापं गतं दुःखं गतं दारिद्र्यमेव च।
आगता सुखसम्पत्तिः पुण्याच्च तव दर्शनात्॥
मन्त्रहीनं क्रियाहीनं भक्तिहीनं सुरेश्वर।
यत्पूजितं मया देव परिपूर्णं तदस्तु मे॥
यदक्षरपदभ्रष्टं मात्राहीनं च यद्भवेत्।
तत्सर्वं क्षम्यतां देव प्रसीद परमेश्वर॥

mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:mushikavahana-sl.title: Mushikavahana Sloka (Visarjan)
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:mushikavahana-sl.text:
मूषिकवाहन मोदकहस्त
चामरकर्ण विलम्बितसूत्र ।
वामनरूप महेस्वरपुत्र
विघ्नविनायक पाद नमस्ते ॥

mantra:ganesh:vakratunda-mahakaya-mantra.title: Vakratunda Mahakaya Mantra
mantra:ganesh:vakratunda-mahakaya-mantra.text: Vakratunda Mahakaya Koti Surya Samaprabha, Nirvighnam Kurume Deva Sarva Karyeshu Sarvada

mantra:ganesh:om-gajaananam-mantra.title: Om Gajaananam Mantra
mantra:ganesh:om-gajaananam-mantra.text:
Om Gajaananam Bhuta Ganaadi Sevitam
Kapitta Jambuu Phala Saar Pakshitam
Umasutam Shoka Vinaasha Kaaranam
Namami Vighneshwara Paada Pankajam

mantra:ganesh:shuklambharadharam-mantra.title: Shuklambharadharam Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shuklambharadharam-mantra.text:
Shuklambharadharam Vishnum Shashi Varnam Chaturbhujam
Prasanna Vadanam Dhyayet Sarva Vighnopa Shantaye.

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhyana-mantra.title: Shri Ganesha Dhyana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhyana-mantra.text:
Udyad-Dineshwara-Ruchim Nija-Hasta-Padmaih,
Pashankushabhaya-Varan Dadhatam Gajasyam।
Raktambaram Sakala-Duhkhaharam Ganesham,
Dhyaye Prasannamakhilabharanabhiramam॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-avahana-mantr.title: Shri Ganesha Avahana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-avahana-mantr.text:
Agachchha Deva-Devesha! Tejorashe Ganapate!
Kriyamanam Maya Pujam Grihana Sura-Sattama!
॥Shrimad-Ganapati-Devam Avahayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushpanjali-a.title: Shri Ganesha Pushpanjali (Asana) Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushpanjali-a.text:
Nanaratna-Samayuktam Karta-Svara-Vibhushitam।
Asanam Deva Devesha! Prityartham Pratigrihyatam॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-padya-mantra.title: Shri Ganesha Padya Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-padya-mantra.text:
Padyam Grihana Devesha Sarvakshemasamartha Bhoh!
Bhaktya Samarpitam Deva GanaPate! Namoastu Te॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Padyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-arghya-mantra.title: Shri Ganesha Arghya Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-arghya-mantra.text:
Namaste Deva Devesha! Namaste Dharani-Dhara!
Namaste Sarvanagendra Namaste Purushottama।
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam॥
Grihana Toyamarghyartham Parameshwara Vatsala!
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Arghyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-chandan-samar.title: Shri Ganesha Chandan Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-chandan-samar.text:
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam।
Vilepanam Ganapate! Chandanam Pratigrihyatam॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Chandanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushpa-samarp.title: Shri Ganesha Pushpa Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushpa-samarp.text:
Yatha-Prapta-Ritu-Pushpaih Bilva-Tulasi-Dalaishcha!
Pujayami Ganapate! Prasida Me Sureshwara!
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhupa-samarpa.title: Shri Ganesha Dhupa Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhupa-samarpa.text:
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah।
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dipa-samarpan.title: Shri Ganesha Dipa Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dipa-samarpan.text:
Sajyam Trivarti-Samyuktam Vahnina Yojitam Maya,
Dipam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham।
Bhaktya Dipam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane।
Trahi Mam Narakat Ghoraddipoayam Pratigrihyatam॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dipam Darshayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-naivedya-sama.title: Shri Ganesha Naivedya Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-naivedya-sama.text:
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha।
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Pratigrihyatam।
॥ Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Yathamshatah Shriganesha-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami -
Om Pranaya Swaha।
Om Apanaya Swaha।
Om Samanaya Swaha।
Om Udanaya Swaha।
Om Vyanaya Swaha॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-achamana-sama.title: Shri Ganesha Achamana Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-achamana-sama.text:
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam।
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami। Mukha-Prakshalanam।
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami।

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-tambula-samar.title: Shri Ganesha Tambula Samarpana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-tambula-samar.text:
Pugiphalam Mahaddivyam Nagavallidalairyutam।
Karpurailasamayuktam Tambulam Pratigrihyatam॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mukha-Vasartham Pugiphala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dakshina-mant.title: Shri Ganesha Dakshina Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dakshina-mant.text:
Hiranyagarbha-Garbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh।
Anantapunya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pradakshina-m.title: Shri Ganesha Pradakshina Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pradakshina-m.text:
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha।
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade॥
Anyatha Sharanam Nasti Tvameva Sharanam Prabho!
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-vandana-sahit.title: Shri Ganesha Vandana-Sahita Pushpanjali Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-vandana-sahit.text:
Karacharanakritam Vakkayajam Karmajam Va,
Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham।
Viditamaviditam Va Sarvametat Kshamasva,
Jaya Jaya Karunabdhe Shri Ganapate! Trahi।
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-sashtanga-pra.title: Shri Ganesha Sashtanga Pranam Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-sashtanga-pra.text:
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave।
Sashtangoayam Supranamah Prayatnena Maya Kritah॥
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave।
॥Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Sashtanga-Pranamam Samarpayami॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-kshama-prarth.title: Shri Ganesha Kshama Prarthana Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-kshama-prarth.text:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam।
Pujakarma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara॥
Mantrahinam Kriyahinam Bhaktihinam Sureshwara!
Maya Yatpujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me॥
Aparadhasahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya।
Dasoayamiti Mam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara।
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam।
Rupam Dehi Jayam Dehi Yasho Dehi Dwisho Jahi॥
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yajna-Kriyadishu।
Nunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam॥
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shriganesha-Devah Priyatam।
॥Shriganesha-Devarpanamastu॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-raksha-mantra.title: Shri Ganesha Raksha Mantra
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-raksha-mantra.text:
Om Raksha Raksha Ganadhyaksha! Raksha Trailokya-Rakshaka!
Bhaktanamabhayam Kartta! Trata Bhava Bhavarnavat।
॥Anena Pujanena Shriganeshah Riddhi-Siddhi-Sahitah Priyatam, Namo Namah॥

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-avirbhava-ma.title: Shri Ganapati Avirbhava Mantra (Sankshipta Vidhi)
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-avirbhava-ma.text:
Om Gananam Twa Ganapatigam Havamahe
Kavim Kavinamupamashravastamam
Jyeshtharajam Brahmanam Brahmanaspata
Aa Nah Shrinvannutibhih Sida Sadanam

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-avahana-mant.title: Shri Ganapati Avahana Mantra (Sankshipta Vidhi)
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-avahana-mant.text:
Om Bhurbhuvah Svah Shriganapate!
Ihagachchha, Iha Tishtha, Mama Pujam Grihana।

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-prana-pratis.title: Shri Ganapati Prana Pratishta Mantra (Sankshipta Vidhi)
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-prana-pratis.text:
Om Mano Jutirjushatamajyasva Brihaspatiryagyamimam
Tano Tvarishtam Yajna Samimam Dadhatu।
Vishve-Deva Sa Iha Madayantam Om Pratishtha।

mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-dashopachara.title: Shri Ganapati Dashopachara Pujan Mantra (Sankshipta Vidhi)
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-dashopachara.text:
Om Ganapataye Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Gandhakshatam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Pushpam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Dhupam Ghrapayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Dipam Darshayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Naivedyam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Tambulam Samarpayami।
Om Ganapataye Namah Dakshinam Samarpayami।

mantra:ganesh:ganesha-visarjan-sloka-mus.title: Ganesha Visarjan Sloka (Mushikavahana)
mantra:ganesh:ganesha-visarjan-sloka-mus.text:
मूषिकवाहन मोदकहस्त
चामरकर्ण विलम्बितसूत्र ।
वामनरूप महेस्वरपुत्र
विघ्नविनायक पाद नमस्ते ॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:vakratunda-mahakaya-.title: Vakratunda Mahakaya Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:vakratunda-mahakaya-.text: 1) Vakratunda Mahakaya Koti Surya Samaprabha, Nirvighnam Kurume Deva Sarva Karyeshu Sarvada

mantra:gauri-ganesh:om-gajaananam-ganesh.title: Om Gajaananam (Ganesha Dhyana Mantra)
mantra:gauri-ganesh:om-gajaananam-ganesh.text:
2) Om Gajaananam Bhuta Ganaadi Sevitam
Kapitta Jambuu Phala Saar Pakshitam
Umasutam Shoka Vinaasha Kaaranam
Namami Vighneshwara Paada Pankajam

mantra:gauri-ganesh:shuklambharadharam-m.title: Shuklambharadharam Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shuklambharadharam-m.text:
3) Shuklambharadharam Vishnum Shashi Varnam Chaturbhujam
Prasanna Vadanam Dhyayet Sarva Vighnopa Shantaye.

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-av.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Avahana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-av.text:
हे हेरम्ब! त्वमेह्येहि ह्यम्बिकात्र्यम्बकात्मज।
सिद्धिबुद्धिपते त्र्यक्ष लक्षलाभपितुः पितः॥
नागास्यं नागहारं त्वां गणराजं चतुर्भुजम्।
भूषितं स्वायुधैर्दिव्यैः पाशाङ्कुशपरस्वधैः॥
He Heramba Tvamehyehi Hyambikatryambakatmaja।
Siddhibuddhipate Tryaksha Lakshalabhapituh Pitah॥
Nagasyam Nagaharam Tvam Ganarajam Chaturbhujam।
Bhushitam Svayudhairdivyaih Pashankushaparashvadhaih॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pr.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Pratishthapana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pr.text:
अस्यै प्राणाः प्रतिष्ठन्तु अस्यै प्राणा क्षरन्तु च।
अस्यै देवत्वमर्चायै मामहेति च कश्चन॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सुप्रतिष्ठो वरदो भव॥
Asyai Pranah Pratishthantu Asyai Prana Ksharantu Cha।
Asyai Devatvamarchayai Mamaheti Cha Kashchana॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Supratishtho Varado Bhava॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-as.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Asana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-as.text:
विचित्ररत्नखचितं दिव्यास्तरणसंयुतम्।
स्वर्णसिंहासनं चारु गृहाण गुहाग्रज॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
आसनं समर्पयामि॥
Vichitraratnakhachitam Divyastaranasamyutam।
Swarnasimhasanam Charu Grihana Guhagraja॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Asanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Padya Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.text:
ॐ सर्वतीर्थसमुद्भूतं पाद्यं गन्धादिभिर्युतम्।
गजानन गृहाणेदं भगवान् भक्तवत्सलः॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पादयोः पाद्यं समर्पयामि॥
Om Sarvatirthasamudbhutam Padyam Gandhadibhiryutam।
Gajanana Grihanedam Bhagawan Bhaktavatsalah॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ar.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Arghya Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ar.text:
ॐ गणाध्यक्ष नमस्तेऽस्तु गृहाण करुणाकर।
अर्घ्यं च फलसंयुक्तं गन्धमाल्याक्षतैर्युतम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
हस्तयोरर्घ्यं समर्पयामि॥
Om Ganadhyaksha Namasteastu Grihana Karunakara।
Arghyam Cha Phalasamyuktam Gandhamalyakshatairyutam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Hastayorarghyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ac.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Achamana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ac.text:
विघ्नराज नमस्तुभ्यं त्रिदशैरभिवन्दित।
गङ्गोदकेन देवेश कुरुष्वाचमनं प्रभो॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मुखे आचमनीयं समर्पयामि॥
Vighnaraja Namastubhyam Tridashairabhivandita।
Gangodakena Devesha Kurushwachamanam Prabho॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Mukhe Achamaniyam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sn.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sn.text:
मन्दाकिन्यास्तु यद्वारि सर्वपापहरं शुभम्।
तदिदं कल्पितं देव स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सर्वाङ्गस्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Mandakinyastu Yadvari Sarvapapaharam Shubham।
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Sarvanga-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Panchamrita Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.text:
पञ्चामृतं मयाऽऽनीतं पयो दधि घृतं मधु।
शर्करा च समायुक्तं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पञ्चामृत-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Panchamritam Mayaanitam Payo Dadhi Ghritam Madhu।
Sharkara Cha Samayuktam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Panchamrita-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Paya Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa.text:
कामधेनुसमुद्भूतं सर्वेषां जीवनं परम्।
तेजः पुष्टिकरं दिव्यं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
पयः-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Kamadhenusamudbhutam Sarvesham Jivanam Param।
Tejah Pushtikaram Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Payah-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-da.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Dadhi Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-da.text:
पयसस्तु समुद्भूतं मधुराम्लं शशिप्रभम्।
दध्यानीतं मया देव स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
दधि-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Payasastu Samudbhutam Madhuramlam Shashiprabham।
Dadhyanitam Maya Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Dadhi-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-gh.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Ghrita Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-gh.text:
नवनीत-समुत्पन्नं सर्वसंतोषकारकम्।
घृतं तुभ्यं प्रदास्यामि स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
घृत-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Navanita-Samutpannam Sarvasantoshakarakam।
Ghritam Tubhyam Pradasyami Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Ghrita-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ma.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Madhu Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ma.text:
पुष्परेणुसमुद्भूतं सुस्वादु मधुरं मधु।
तेजः पुष्टिकरं दिव्यं स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
मधु-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Pushparenusamudbhutam Suswadu Madhuram Madhu।
Tejah Pushtikaram Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Madhu-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Sharkara Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh.text:
इक्षुरससमुद्भूतां शर्करां पुष्टिदां शुभाम्।
मलापहारिकां दिव्यां स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
शर्करा-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Ikshurasasamudbhutam Sharkaram Pushtidam Shubham।
Malapaharikam Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Sharkara-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-su.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Suvasita Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-su.text:
चम्पाकाशेकबकुल-मालती-मोगरादिभिः।
वासितं स्निग्धताहेतुर्तैलं चारु प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
सुवासित-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Champakashekabakula-Malati-Mogaradibhih।
Vasitam Snigdhataheturtailam Charu Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Suvasita-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Shuddhodaka Snana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh.text:
गङ्गा च यमुना चैव गोदावरी सरस्वती।
नर्मदा-सिन्धु-कावेरी स्नानार्थं प्रतिगृह्यताम्॥
ॐ सिद्धि-बुद्धि-सहिताय श्रीमहागणाधिपतये नमः।
शुद्धोदक-स्नानं समर्पयामि॥
Ganga Cha Yamuna Chaiva Godavari Saraswati।
Narmada-Sindhu-Kaveri Snanartham Pratigrihyatam॥
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah।
Shuddhodaka-Snanam Samarpayami॥

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-va.title: Ganesha Chaturthi Vastra Samarpana Mantra
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-va.text:
